jobs.title: NBRC Research Associate-I Vacancy 2026, Apply Now , Free Form PDF -
jobs.how_to_apply: Download the Form: visit the official website https://www.nbrc.ac.in/newweb/ Fill the form in BLOCK CAPITAL letters carefully, and provide accurate personal, educational, and professional details. Attach all documents: Include Self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, Fee Receipt , and age proof (Aadhar, PAN, etc.). Also, attach a self-addressed envelope of size 25 cm x 10 cm. The envelope containing the application should be superscribed as “Application for the post of ___________________”. Send Application Form: Administrative officer (Academics), National Brain Research Centre, NH8, Nainwal Mode, Manesar, Haryana 122052 NBRC Research Associate-I Vacancy 2026
jobs.jobs_info: NBRC Research Associate-I Vacancy 2026: National Brain Research Centre (NBRC) has issued a notification for the position of Research Associate-I. The recruitment drive comprises one vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 10-06-2026+, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the NBRC Research Associate-I Vacancy 2026 recruitment is provided below.

vacancy_details.eligibility: Ph.D/MD or equivalent degree with at least one research article published in a reputed and indexed journal.

jobs.title: Indian Railway Catering and Tourism Corporation Limited Hospitality Monitor Recruitment 2026 -
jobs.how_to_apply: Candidates are requested to fill out the application form (attached to this notification) correctly in all respects. The completed application form must be submitted along with original documents, a set of attested copies of the required documents, and two recent passport-sized photographs at the interview venue for verification. An interview will be conducted, and candidates will be shortlisted based on their credentials and performance in the personal interview. Eligible candidates will be offered engagement based on merit and the number of vacancies, after verification of their records.
